reference: Hi, I am thirty. We have been trying for a baby for the past five months. I took Fertyl tablets in the month of March, but I got my period regularly. Then, the next month, I took Letrozole, but still, no success. Please advise what to do. Is my age a reason for not getting pregnant?
text: Hi, I am thirty. We have been trying for a baby for the past five months. I took fertile tablets in the month of March, but I got my period regularly. Then the next month, I took letrozole, but still no success. Please advise what to do. Is my reason for not getting pregnant?
